steps.title: Identify the task's focus
steps.content: The task specifies describing the work to a new audience. This means the answer must focus on what Silver Upper White River specifically IS—its material, appearance, and form—not on the artist's background or comparisons to other pieces.

steps.title: Select the concrete description
steps.content: Choice A describes Silver Upper White River directly: a large-scale installation made of recycled silver that fills an entire gallery wall, completed in 2015. Choices B, C, and D either highlight the artist's background, compare the work to Women's Table, or use vague language. That matches choice A—A is correct.
